summary: Recorded project-owner-reported native/fluent review completion for all 18 non-English locales. The 17 previously parked non-German per-locale native-review slices are now done; each matching return file has provenance.native_reviewed=true and 419/419 entries marked native-reviewed. Resource headers, review dashboard, HIG matrix native-review state, and localization docs were updated. This does not claim all-locale hig-ui-reviewed; HIG closure remains blocked on scoped evidence and remaining in-progress findings.

contract_status_changes.before: Only German was native-reviewed; 17 non-German locale review slices were blocked.
contract_status_changes.after: All 18 non-English locale return files are native/fluent-reviewed within their 419-entry return-file scope.

residual_risks: All-locale HIG UI readiness is still not claimed; HIG-DE-001 and HIG-AR-002 remain pending proof/closure in the HIG evidence matrix.
Device and TestFlight localization proof were not performed in this intake.
recommended_next_reason: Run the supervisor after commit; HIG closure should remain blocked until scoped HIG evidence is complete.
